name: Macho Shot
short_description: Macho Shot! Raise your Machos and grow them as big as possible!
detailed_description:
Merge Machos of the same type and they'll grow!
Be careful not to let them overflow off the field!
Reach for a new high score!

[Rules]
Throw the machos!
You will score points when you combine them!
Note that the game is over if you cross the line!
Try to combine the machos to score points without getting game over!

[Score Attack]
Increase your score and aim for the top of the world leaderboards!

[Battle]
Compete with up to 4 players, block each other out, and survive until the end!

To receive news and update notifications
Please click on Developer: SAT-BOX at the top of the store page and Follow us!
